entries.title: Challenge expiry not re-checked before verify submit
entries.closure_note: Added expiry re-check after solve step (Step 5) before submit, using the same buffered_expiry comparison

entries.title: Network errors during verify are not retried
entries.closure_note: submit_with_retry now catches CliError::Network on the Err path and retries (up to max_attempts) instead of returning immediately

entries.title: --summary CLI flag accepted but silently ignored by register_creator
entries.closure_note: Removed --summary flag from Register variant, register_creator() function signature, and all call sites
